results.rendered_html: dādhṛṣi (vom intens. von dharṣ) adj. herzhaft, kühn: pra te nāvaṃ na samane vacasyuvaṃ brahmaṇā yāmi savaneṣu dādhṛṣiḥ  ṚV. 2,16,7 . satrāhaṇaṃ dādhṛṣiṃ tumramindraṃ mahāmapāraṃ vṛṣabham 4,17,8 . yadbhadrasya puruṣasya putro bhavati dādhṛṣiḥ  AV. 20,128,3 .
